text: BTS/NICE/SIGN Joint Guideline on Asthma: 1 year on It’s one year since the British Thoracic Society (BTS), National Institute for Health and Care Excellence (NICE) and the Scottish Intercollegiate Guidelines Network (SIGN) published a UK-wide Joint Guideline on Asthma: diagnosis, monitoring and chronic asthma management.

update from BTS, NICE and SIGN in the recent press release SIGN 245: Asthma: diagnosis, monitoring and chronic asthma management SIGN 173: Management of chronic pain (part 1) SIGN 172: Prevention and remission of type 2 diabetes SIGN 171: Management of diabetes in pregnancy.
